languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, вы здесь! Вот уж я знал, что вы нас не бросите! Эти железные твари жмут нас по всей планете. Никто не знает, откуда они взялись — по крайней мере, в этой суматохе выяснить пока не получилось".

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't abandon us! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion, anyway."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, вы здесь! Вот уж я знал, что вы нас не бросите! Эти железные твари жмут нас по всей планете. Никто не знает, откуда они взялись — по крайней мере, в этой суматохе выяснить пока не получилось".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't leave us in the lurch! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or, at least, we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't abandon us! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion, anyway."

"Lord Captain, you're here! Ha, I knew you wouldn't leave us in the lurch! Permission to report — those iron xenos have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or, at least, we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't leave us in the lurch! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or, at least, we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't abandon us! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion, anyway."

languages.text: 「艦長様、おいでになられました！ああ、お任せしてよかったです！報告の許可を頂戴します。鉄の異星人が地球各地で攻撃を仕掛けています。その起源は不明です。少なくとも、混乱の渦の中でその出自を特定することはできませんでした」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, you're here! Ha, I knew you wouldn't leave us in the lurch! Permission to report — those iron xenos have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or, at least, we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion."

traits.locale_text: 「艦長様、おいでになられました！ああ、お任せしてよかったです！報告の許可を頂戴します。鉄の異星人が地球各地で攻撃を仕掛けています。その起源は不明です。少なくとも、混乱の渦の中でその出自を特定することはできませんでした。」

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ha venido! ¡Sabía que no nos abandonaría! Esos seres de metal nos atacan en todo el planeta. Nadie sabe de dónde han salido, o, por lo menos, todavía no hemos recibido la información en medio de esta conmoción».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't abandon us! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion, anyway."

traits.locale_text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ha venido! ¡Sabía que no nos abandonaría! Esos seres de metal nos atacan en todo el planeta. Nadie sabe de dónde han salido, o, por lo menos, todavía no hemos recibido la información en medio de esta conmoción».

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Ihr seid hier! Ich wusste, Ihr lasst uns nicht im Stich! Diese Eisenkreaturen haben uns auf dem gesamten Planeten angegriffen. Niemand weiß, woher sie kamen ... jedenfalls konnten wir das angesichts der chaotischen Lage nicht herausfinden."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't abandon us! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion, anyway."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Ihr seid hier! Ich wusste, Ihr lasst uns nicht im Stich! Diese Eisenkreaturen haben uns auf dem gesamten Planeten angegriffen. Niemand weiß, woher sie kamen ... jedenfalls konnten wir das angesichts der chaotischen Lage nicht herausfinden."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, vous êtes là ! Je savais que vous ne nous abandonneriez pas ! Ces créatures métalliques nous harcèlent sans discontinuer. Elles attaquent de partout et personne ne sait d'où elles viennent. Enfin, disons plutôt que personne n'a pu se pencher sur la question, vu la confusion générale. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't abandon us! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion, anyway."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, vous êtes là ! Je savais que vous ne nous abandonneriez pas ! Ces créatures métalliques nous harcèlent sans discontinuer. Elles attaquent de partout et personne ne sait d'où elles viennent. Enfin, disons plutôt que personne n'a pu se pencher sur la question, vu la confusion générale. »

languages.text: “大人，您来了！我就知道您不会丢下我们不管！整颗行星都遭到了铁皮生物的攻击。没人知道它们是从哪儿冒出来的，而且在眼下兵荒马乱的情况下，我们还没办法查清。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't abandon us! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion, anyway."

traits.locale_text: “大人，您来了！我就知道您不会丢下我们不管！整颗行星都遭到了铁皮生物的攻击。没人知道它们是从哪儿冒出来的，而且在眼下兵荒马乱的情况下，我们还没办法查清。”

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, yettiniz! Bizi terk etmeyeceğinizi biliyordum! Demir yaratıklar, gezegenin yer yerinde bize saldırıyor. Kimse nereden geldiklerini bilmiyor... En azından bu kargaşada öğrenemedik."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you're here! I knew you wouldn't abandon us! Those iron creatures have been attacking us all over the planet. No one knows where they came from — or we haven't been able to find out in all the confusion, anyway."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, yettiniz! Bizi terk etmeyeceğinizi biliyordum! Demir yaratıklar, gezegenin yer yerinde bize saldırıyor. Kimse nereden geldiklerini bilmiyor... En azından bu kargaşada öğrenemedik."
